name: Pumpkin Bread with Crumb Topping
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups firm packed light brown sugar
2 cups canned pumpkin (cooked fresh works too)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9x5x2 inch loaf pans.
3. Beat 1/2 cup butter in a large bowl until smooth and creamy.
4. Add 3/4 cup brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla; beat until light and fluffy.
5. Blend in pumpkin.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Mix together the remaining flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg; stir into pumpkin mixture.
8. Fold in 1 cup of pecans and raisins.
9. Spoon batter into pans.
10. With a fork, mix remaining butter, brown sugar, flour, and pecans.
11. Sprinkle half of this mixture evenly over each loaf; pat down lightly.
12. Bake about 50 minutes or until a cake tester (or toothpick) inserted in the center comes out clean.
13. Cool in pans for 10 minutes, then remove to a rack to cool completely.
Makes 2 loaves, 24 servings, 255 calories per serving.
